description:
The Project-Env CLI represents the raw core of Project-Env which allows the setup of tools based on a project-env.toml configuration file and therefore the integration of Project-Env into an existing environment.


🚀 New features and improvements
- Add Clojure support (#291) @repolevedavaj
- Add PowerShell template (#290) @repolevedavaj
📦 Dependency updates
- Bump org.semver4j:semver4j from 5.4.1 to 5.5.0 (#277) @dependabot
- Bump org.apache.commons:commons-text from 1.12.0 to 1.13.0 (#274) @dependabot
- Bump org.graalvm.buildtools:native-maven-plugin from 0.10.3 to 0.10.4 (#273) @dependabot
- Bump commons-io:commons-io from 2.17.0 to 2.18.0 (#272) @dependabot
- Bump org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin from 4.0.0.4121 to 5.0.0.4389 (#271) @dependabot
- Bump org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-surefire-plugin from 3.5.1 to 3.5.2 (#269) @dependabot
- Bump org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-failsafe-plugin from 3.5.1 to 3.5.2 (#270) @dependabot
- Bump org.codehaus.mojo:exec-maven-plugin from 3.4.1 to 3.5.0 (#268) @dependabot
- Bump org.junit:junit-bom from 5.11.2 to 5.11.3 (#267) @dependabot
- Bump org.semver4j:semver4j from 5.4.0 to 5.4.1 (#266) @dependabot
- Bump org.mockito:mockito-core from 5.14.1 to 5.14.2 (#265) @dependabot
- Bump org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-surefire-plugin from 3.5.0 to 3.5.1 (#262) @dependabot
- Bump org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-failsafe-plugin from 3.5.0 to 3.5.1 (#263) @dependabot
- Bump org.junit:junit-bom from 5.11.1 to 5.11.2 (#261) @dependabot
